history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An image shows a grid of stylized character or avatar panels on the left alongside repeated circular emblem icons in the center, with a blue-purple game-style background and a text/status area at the bottom.

Main Subject:
The central focus is a column of identical-looking circular emblem images featuring a book icon in the middle and surrounding text around the ring, repeated multiple times vertically.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a screen capture of a mobile game or UI, with a dark blue and purple background gradient and faint geometric patterns, and a user-interface bar at the bottom.

Visual Details:
On the left side, there are several stacked character portrait cards with colorful, anime-like or game-like faces. Each card includes a small circular flag-like icon near the top left, a circular green glowing emblem to the right, and a larger stylized portrait. Under each portrait, there is gold or yellow text reading “TSAR” followed by a name. The layout is vertical, with multiple entries stacked from top to bottom. In the middle, five rectangular tiles each contain the same circular emblem: a blue outer ring, a green inner field, a white book icon, and a small yellow banner with readable text inside the banner. On the right side, there is a triangular or panel-like icon resembling a send/message symbol and other faint UI elements. At the bottom, there is a dark bar with green text beginning with “Pr1defool:” followed by white text, and a light-blue chat or navigation icon on the left and a circular icon on the right.

Visible Text:
TSAR Tachyon
TSAR Thyeref
TSAR Pr1defool
TSAR Umbara
TSAR rapshikii.
SMP NEGERI 3 CIBADAK
53 CERDIK BERBURDI
KAB. SUKABUMI
Pr1defool : Ban Granger (M

Practical Summary:
The image is a game-like UI screen showing multiple character cards on the left and repeated circular school/emblem icons in the center. A bottom message/status bar displays text starting with “Pr1defool : Ban Granger (M)”.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

TSAR Thyeref  
TSAR Pr1defool  
TSAR Umbara  
TSAR rapshikii.

SMP NEGERI 3 CIBADAK  
53 CERDIK BERBUDI  
KAB. SUKABUMI

Pr1defool : Ban Granger (M

# Structured Version

## List of items (left side)
- TSAR Tachyon  
- TSAR Thyeref  
- TSAR Pr1defool  
- TSAR Umbara  
- TSAR rapshikii.

## Badge/Emblem text (center side, repeated)
- SMP NEGERI 3 CIBADAK  
- 53 CERDIK BERBUDI  
- KAB. SUKABUMI

## Bottom bar
- Pr1defool : Ban Granger (M

# Notes

- The very end of the last line appears truncated; only **“Pr1defool : Ban Granger (M”** is clearly visible.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
